sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih podataka na internetu je veoma važna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal information on the internet is very important.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْتَخْدِمِينَ اخْتِيَارُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici moraju birati jake lozinke za svoje račune.
sentences.translationEn: Users must choose strong passwords for their accounts.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْبَغِي لَنَا فَتْحُ رَوَابِطَ مَشْبُوهَةٍ مِنْ أَشْخَاصٍ مَجْهُولِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ne bismo trebali otvarati sumnjive linkove od nepoznatih osoba.
sentences.translationEn: We should not open suspicious links from unknown people.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ خُبَرَاءُ الْأَمْنِ السَّيْبِرَانِيِّ عَلَى مَنْعِ الْهَجَمَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci za kibernetičku sigurnost rade na sprječavanju digitalnih napada.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity experts work to prevent digital attacks.
